1	import type { DatamodelEnum, Field, Model } from '@prisma/dmmf'
2	
3	const PRISMA_SCALAR_TO_TS: Record<string, string> = {
4	  String: 'string',
5	  Int: 'number',
6	  Float: 'number',
7	  Boolean: 'boolean',
8	  DateTime: 'string',
9	  BigInt: 'string',
10	  Decimal: 'string',
11	  Json: 'unknown',
12	  Bytes: 'string',
13	}
14	
15	/** Maps a Prisma scalar type name to its TypeScript representation. */
16	export function mapPrismaScalarToTypeScript(prismaType: string): string {
17	  return PRISMA_SCALAR_TO_TS[prismaType] ?? 'unknown'
18	}
19	
20	/** Generates the file header and shared helper types used by the REST client. */
21	export function generatePreamble(): string {
22	  return `// Generated by @prisma/generator-rest-client — DO NOT EDIT
23	
24	type RequestOptions = {
25	  headers?: Record<string, string>
26	  signal?: AbortSignal
27	}
28	
29	type RestClientConfig = {
30	  baseUrl: string
31	  headers?: Record<string, string>
32	  fetch?: typeof globalThis.fetch
33	}`
34	}
35	
36	/** Generates a TypeScript union type for a Prisma enum. */
37	export function generateEnumType(enumDef: DatamodelEnum): string {
38	  const values = enumDef.values.map((v) => `'${v.name}'`).join(' | ')
39	  return `export type ${enumDef.name} = ${values}`
40	}
41	
42	/**
43	 * Generates four TypeScript interfaces for a model:
44	 * - `Model` — all scalar/enum fields
45	 * - `ModelCreateInput` — auto-generated fields become optional
46	 * - `ModelUpdateInput` — all fields optional, id fields excluded
47	 * - `ModelWhereUniqueInput` — only id and unique fields
48	 */
49	export function generateModelInterfaces(model: Model): string {
50	  const scalarFields = model.fields.filter((f) => f.kind === 'scalar' || f.kind === 'enum')
51	
52	  const mainInterface = renderInterface(model.name, scalarFields, { allOptional: false })
53	
54	  const createInterface = renderInterface(`${model.name}CreateInput`, scalarFields, {
55	    allOptional: false,
56	    optionalOverride: (f) => isAutoGenerated(f),
57	  })
58	
59	  const updateFields = scalarFields.filter((f) => !f.isId)
60	  const updateInterface = renderInterface(`${model.name}UpdateInput`, updateFields, { allOptional: true })
61	
62	  const uniqueFields = scalarFields.filter((f) => f.isId || f.isUnique)
63	  const whereUniqueInterface = renderInterface(`${model.name}WhereUniqueInput`, uniqueFields, { allOptional: false })
64	
65	  return [mainInterface, createInterface, updateInterface, whereUniqueInterface].join('\n\n')
66	}
67	
68	/** Generates a delegate interface with typed CRUD methods for a model. */
69	export function generateModelCrudMethods(model: Model): string {
70	  const n = model.name
71	  return `export interface ${n}Delegate {
72	  findMany(options?: RequestOptions): Promise<${n}[]>
73	  findUnique(where: ${n}WhereUniqueInput, options?: RequestOptions): Promise<${n} | null>
74	  create(data: ${n}CreateInput, options?: RequestOptions): Promise<${n}>
75	  update(where: ${n}WhereUniqueInput, data: ${n}UpdateInput, options?: RequestOptions): Promise<${n}>
76	  delete(where: ${n}WhereUniqueInput, options?: RequestOptions): Promise<${n}>
77	}`
78	}
79	
80	/** Generates the `RestClient` class that wires up all model delegates. */
81	export function generateClientClass(models: ReadonlyArray<Model>): string {
82	  const props = models.map((m) => {
83	    const lower = m.name.charAt(0).toLowerCase() + m.name.slice(1)
84	    const plural = `${lower}s`
85	    return { typeName: m.name, propName: lower, path: plural, delegate: `${m.name}Delegate` }
86	  })
87	
88	  const propertyDeclarations = props.map((p) => `  readonly ${p.propName}: ${p.delegate}`).join('\n')
89	
90	  const delegateAssignments = props
91	    .map(
92	      (p) => `    this.${p.propName} = {
93	      findMany: (options) =>
94	        this.#request('GET', '/${p.path}', undefined, options),
95	      findUnique: (where, options) =>
96	        this.#request('GET', \`/${p.path}/\${extractId(where)}\`, undefined, options),
97	      create: (data, options) =>
98	        this.#request('POST', '/${p.path}', data, options),
99	      update: (where, data, options) =>
100	        this.#request('PATCH', \`/${p.path}/\${extractId(where)}\`, data, options),
101	      delete: (where, options) =>
102	        this.#request('DELETE', \`/${p.path}/\${extractId(where)}\`, undefined, options),
103	    }`,
104	    )
105	    .join('\n\n')
106	
107	  return `function extractId(where: Record<string, unknown>): string {
108	  const value = Object.values(where)[0]
109	  return String(value)
110	}
111	
112	export class RestClient {
113	  #baseUrl: string
114	  #headers: Record<string, string>
115	  #fetch: typeof globalThis.fetch
116	
117	${propertyDeclarations}
118	
119	  constructor(config: RestClientConfig) {
120	    this.#baseUrl = config.baseUrl.replace(/\\/$/, '')
121	    this.#headers = config.headers ?? {}
122	    this.#fetch = config.fetch ?? globalThis.fetch.bind(globalThis)
123	
124	${delegateAssignments}
125	  }
126	
127	  async #request<T>(method: string, path: string, body?: unknown, options?: RequestOptions): Promise<T> {
128	    const response = await this.#fetch(\`\${this.#baseUrl}\${path}\`, {
129	      method,
130	      headers: {
131	        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
132	        ...this.#headers,
133	        ...options?.headers,
134	      },
135	      body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,
136	      signal: options?.signal,
137	    })
138	
139	    if (!response.ok) {
140	      throw new Error(\`REST client error: \${response.status} \${response.statusText}\`)
141	    }
142	
143	    return response.json() as Promise<T>
144	  }
145	}`
146	}
147	
148	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
149	// Internal helpers
150	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
151	
152	function resolveFieldType(field: Field): string {
153	  if (field.kind === 'enum') {
154	    return field.type
155	  }
156	  return mapPrismaScalarToTypeScript(field.type)
157	}
158	
159	function isAutoGenerated(field: Field): boolean {
160	  return field.hasDefaultValue || field.isGenerated === true || field.isUpdatedAt === true
161	}
162	
163	function renderInterface(
164	  name: string,
165	  fields: ReadonlyArray<Field>,
166	  opts: { allOptional: boolean; optionalOverride?: (f: Field) => boolean },
167	): string {
168	  const lines = fields.map((f) => {
169	    const tsType = resolveFieldType(f)
170	    const optional = opts.allOptional || !f.isRequired || opts.optionalOverride?.(f)
171	    const list = f.isList ? '[]' : ''
172	    return `  ${f.name}${optional ? '?' : ''}: ${tsType}${list}`
173	  })
174	  return `export interface ${name} {\n${lines.join('\n')}\n}`
175	}
176

1	import fs from 'node:fs'
2	import path from 'node:path'
3	
4	import type { GeneratorOptions } from '@prisma/generator'
5	
6	import {
7	  generateClientClass,
8	  generateEnumType,
9	  generateModelCrudMethods,
10	  generateModelInterfaces,
11	  generatePreamble,
12	} from './template'
13	
14	/** `onGenerate` implementation — builds a typed REST client from the DMMF. */
15	export async function onGenerate(options: GeneratorOptions): Promise<void> {
16	  const outputDir = options.generator.output?.value ?? './generated/rest-client'
17	  const { datamodel } = options.dmmf
18	
19	  const sections: string[] = []
20	
21	  sections.push(generatePreamble())
22	
23	  for (const enumDef of datamodel.enums) {
24	    sections.push(generateEnumType(enumDef))
25	  }
26	
27	  for (const model of datamodel.models) {
28	    sections.push(generateModelInterfaces(model))
29	  }
30	
31	  for (const model of datamodel.models) {
32	    sections.push(generateModelCrudMethods(model))
33	  }
34	
35	  sections.push(generateClientClass(datamodel.models))
36	
37	  const outputPath = path.resolve(outputDir, 'rest-client.ts')
38	  await fs.promises.mkdir(outputDir, { recursive: true })
39	  await fs.promises.writeFile(outputPath, sections.join('\n\n') + '\n')
40	}
41

1	import { generatorHandler } from '@prisma/generator-helper'
2	
3	import { onGenerate } from './generator'
4	
5	generatorHandler({
6	  onManifest() {
7	    return {
8	      defaultOutput: './generated/rest-client',
9	      prettyName: 'Prisma REST Client',
10	    }
11	  },
12	  onGenerate,
13	})
14

1	export { onGenerate } from './generator'
2	export {
3	  generateClientClass,
4	  generateEnumType,
5	  generateModelCrudMethods,
6	  generateModelInterfaces,
7	  generatePreamble,
8	  mapPrismaScalarToTypeScript,
9	} from './template'

All source files look correct. Let me now do a final summary of everything that was created and modified.

Here's what was implemented:

## Files Created (7 new files)

### Package configuration:
1. **`packages/generator-rest-client/package.json`** — Package manifest with `@prisma/generator-rest-client` name, dual CJS/ESM exports, `bin` field pointing to `dist/bin.js`, and workspace dependencies on `@prisma/dmmf`, `@prisma/generator`, and `@prisma/generator-helper`.

2. **`packages/generator-rest-client/tsconfig.json`** — IDE tsconfig extending root `tsconfig.json`.

3. **`packages/generator-rest-client/tsconfig.build.json`** — Build tsconfig extending `tsconfig.build.regular.json` with `outDir: "dist"`, `rootDir: "src"`.

4. **`packages/generator-rest-client/helpers/build.ts`** — Build script using `createAdapterConfig` for the library entry (CJS + ESM) and a custom bin config with `banner: { js: '#!/usr/bin/env node' }`.

### Source code:
5. **`packages/generator-rest-client/src/bin.ts`** — Executable entry point that calls `generatorHandler()` with `onManifest` (returning `defaultOutput` and `prettyName`) and `onGenerate` (delegating to `generator.ts`).

6. **`packages/generator-rest-client/src/generator.ts`** — Main generation logic: resolves output dir from `options.generator.output`, iterates DMMF enums and models, assembles sections (preamble → enums → interfaces → delegates → client class), writes `rest-client.ts`.

7. **`packages/generator-rest-client/src/template.ts`** — Code generation helpers:
   - `mapPrismaScalarToTypeScript()` — maps Prisma scalars (String→string, Int→number, DateTime→string, etc.)
   - `generatePreamble()` — header comment + `RequestOptions` / `RestClientConfig` types
   - `generateEnumType()` — string union types from Prisma enums
   - `generateModelInterfaces()` — 4 interfaces per model (base, `CreateInput`, `UpdateInput`, `WhereUniqueInput`) with smart field filtering (excludes relations, makes auto-generated fields optional in create, excludes ids from update)
   - `generateModelCrudMethods()` — delegate interface with `findMany`, `findUnique`, `create`, `update`, `delete`
   - `generateClientClass()` — `RestClient` class with private `#fetch` wrapper, per-model delegate properties, RESTful URL construction

8. **`packages/generator-rest-client/src/index.ts`** — Public API exports for programmatic use.

## Files Modified (1 existing file)

9. **`tsconfig.build.bundle.json`** — Added `"@prisma/generator-rest-client": ["./packages/generator-rest-client/src"]` path mapping for editor go-to-definition support.

## Build Verification

The package builds successfully with Turborepo (`8 tasks successful`), producing:
- `dist/bin.js` — with `#!/usr/bin/env node` shebang (executable)
- `dist/index.js` — CJS bundle
- `dist/index.mjs` — ESM bundle
- `dist/index.d.ts` / `dist/index.d.mts` — TypeScript declarations
- `dist/template.d.ts`, `dist/generator.d.ts` — Supporting type declarations
